property.name: 17477a69-d9a5-4251-9329-0963e8121b5f
property.value:
### Stereotype Definition Rules
You **MUST** call `get_designer_script_api` with `full = true` before working with stereotype definitions — this is the only source of the complete `IStereotypeDefinitionApi` and `IStereotypePropertyDefinitionApi` member lists (properties, setters, and enum values).
High level guidelines:
- Use `addStereotypeDefinition(name)` on a package or element (including folders) to create a definition. `createElementUnder` and `addChild` do **not** work for stereotype definitions — they will not create one. Folders are elements (`IElementApi`); obtain one via `lookupByName` or `getChild`. - `setTargetTypes()` and `setTargetReferenceTypes()` accept element-settings type **names** (e.g. `"Class"`, `"Attribute"`) — resolved to IDs automatically. Get valid names from `get_designer_schema`'s "Element types" block.
